markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on scalable, on‑brand image generation for Cresta Guides](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Volume + lead time → 5 guide posts/week; 1-week content calendar available to plan image batches](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [ImageGen pipeline → NanoBanana + GPT with templated art direction; steer via 6–10 focused reference images to avoid style dilution](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Direction test plan → Explore two tracks: abstract (more purely abstract, data/tech textures, icons) vs photography (NanoBanana; muted palette, controlled lighting); avoid “contact center” clichés (no headsets), prefer “knowledge workers” or customers on phone/chat](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Collaboration loop → Shared Figma for assets, examples, and outputs; Steve to supply larger asset/guidance set; Katia to iterate and post outputs for fast feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

## Topics

### Publishing cadence and planning

  - [Target cadence → 5 images/week for cresta.com/guides](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Lead time → At least 1 week of topics via GrowthX content calendar](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [Practicality concern → Approach must scale with minimal per‑post design time](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Current ImageGen workflow (GrowthX)

  - [Models/APIs → NanoBanana and GPT](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Input strategy → Topic title as mini‑prompt by default; switchable to full-article content prompt](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Art direction → Templated baseline + small set of reference images guide outputs](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [Reference images count → 6–10 recommended; more causes style dilution and inconsistency](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Reference assets needed from Cresta

  - [Asset types → Human imagery style refs (lighting, muted palette), abstract textures, icons, waveform/chat motifs, do/don’t examples](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Scope → Larger set than 6–10 for team context; Katia will select a focused subset for the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Goal → Tighten alignment with Cresta brand; reduce variability vs current mixed blog styles (2D, 3D, photos)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Style direction and constraints

  - [Human imagery → Possible via NanoBanana; quality improved recently](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [People depiction → “Knowledge workers” or customers (phone/chat/text); avoid headsets and call-center tropes](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Look/feel → Neutral/muted palette; specific lighting direction](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
  - [Abstract track → If abstract, lean fully abstract (avoid quasi‑literal graphics that suggest specific objects without relevance)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Visual language → Data/technical textures, waveforms, chat bubbles, up‑and‑to‑the‑right graphs, icons over abstract backgrounds](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
  - [Decision approach → Run both tracks (abstract vs photographic) and compare outputs for fit, speed, and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

### Feedback on current outputs

  - [Issue → Too literal without semantic tie-in to article topics; creates confusion](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Adjustment → Either increase abstraction (non-representational) or ensure clear, topic-relevant visual metaphors](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Practical simplification → Consider photography or abstract backgrounds with one or more brand icons overlayed for clarity + scalability](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### Collaboration workflow

  - [Workspace → Figma as the single shared surface](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Steve → Populate assets, references, do/don’t notes](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Katia → Post iterative outputs, maintain two pipelines (abstract vs photo), tweak lighting/art direction, annotate changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Review loop → Share small batches; Steve provides rapid, specific feedback to converge on a repeatable template](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Steve Raikow (Cresta)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
    
      - [Share Figma access and populate with:](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [Human imagery refs (lighting, muted palette), “knowledge worker/customer” examples](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [Abstract textures, waveform/chat motifs, icon set; brand-aligned examples](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
          - [Do/don’t guidance (including “avoid contact center tropes/headsets”)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
      - [Provide notes on preferred overlays (icons on abstract/photo) and any strict exclusions](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Review Katia’s first output batches within 24–48 hours of posting and give decisive feedback](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

  - [Katia Pembayun (GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
    
      - [Share Figma page with Steve; set structure for assets, prompts, outputs, and notes](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Configure two pipelines:](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
          - [Abstract/illustrative (GPT) → stronger abstraction, data/tech textures, icon overlays](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
          - [Photographic (NanoBanana) → muted palette, controlled lighting; consider simple icon overlays](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
      - [Limit pipeline refs to 6–10 focused images; document chosen set in Figma](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Generate first comparative batch (both tracks) using upcoming week’s 5 topics (title‑based prompts; optionally 1 test with content-based prompt)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
      - [Annotate each image with prompt, ref set, and art‑direction tweaks for reproducibility](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

  - [Aida Knezevic (GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
    
      - [Share the 1‑week content calendar with Steve (topics for next 5 posts)](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Provide the “seven thematic clusters” overview to inform visual motifs](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Ensure prior example set (e.g., “v23”) is linked in Figma for historical context](https://fathom.video/share/ZkmyQwW5q4MFg5B12yqHtfF-HQkxuecx?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
